projects.name: KJWidgetz

prelaunch.n: Switch Stripe to live keys — sk_live_ + new webhook endpoint + update STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET

Wire Twilio SMS opt-in (P10) — A2P approved, add TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID + TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN to Render
Set NODE_ENV=production on Render — currently 'development' which exposes dev_token
Add VOICEDROPZ_BRIDGE_KEY env var to Render — value: kjvoicedropz-bridge-2026-king-james
Schedule dunning cron: POST /dunning/run daily via Render scheduled job
Schedule reputation scan cron: POST /reputation/scan daily via Render scheduled job
Point KJWidgetz.com domain to Lovable client portal
Expand niche onboarding from 6 niches to 12+ in /niches/presets
Review pricing strategy: $49/$99/$149/$297 — confirm before first outreach
Create live Stripe webhook + update STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET in Render
